description_long: This is a rustic, hand-crafted plant pot with a wide, shallow bowl and two thick, rounded handles on opposite sides. The pot's surface is uneven and textured, showing visible cracks and color variations that suggest it is made from fired clay or terracotta. The rim is irregular and slightly wavy, giving it an ancient or artisanal appearance. The interior of the pot is also rough, with patches of darker and lighter clay, indicating possible repairs or natural aging. The handles are robust and integrated into the body, providing both functional grip and visual balance. The overall look is utilitarian yet charming, suitable for outdoor or garden settings.
description: A wide, shallow, rustic clay plant pot with two thick handles and a rough, weathered surface. The pot features visible cracks and color variations, giving it an artisanal, aged appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the pot, both handles, and the irregular rim.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting one handle and the interior's cracked, multicolored surface.
description_view_2: Top-down view emphasizing the shallow bowl shape and the patchy, weathered interior.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on a single handle and the pot's sloped, uneven profile.
attribute_placement_context: commonly used in rustic outdoor gardens or patios
